title: Inventory Interactions
description: Repair and craft tools by right clicking!
body:
_formerly known as Quick Repair_

A simple, configurable mod that adds various right-clicking interactions in the inventory, such as repairing and crafting. 
Please report [issues](https://github.com/DistendedDev/inventory-interactions-3/issues) to the github repo. 

Features
* fully configurable using gamerules
* a config file for setting default gamerules (3.1)
* unit repairing
* item combining
* item naming
* shapeless crafting
* using datapacks to add recipes (3.1)
* Please check the [project wiki](https://github.com/DistendedDev/inventory-interactions-3/wiki) for more details
